headline: How The Comcast (CMCSA) Investment Narrative Is Shifting After Versant Spin Off And Fiber Risks
summary: Comcast’s fair value estimate has been adjusted from US$33.93 to US$33.01, putting a finer point on what analysts think the shares are worth right now. That change sits alongside a more divided set of Street opinions, with some cuts into the low to mid US$20s and others reaffirming or raising targets into the mid US$30s and low US$40s as they factor in fiber competition and the Versant spin off. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets and narratives can be tracked and...

headline: Nexstar, Tegna merger closes after winning regulatory approval
summary: Nexstar has closed its $6.2 billion acquisition of Tegna after winning approval from the Federal Communications Commission and Department of Justice.

raw.headline: Nexstar, Tegna merger closes after winning regulatory approval
raw.summary: Nexstar has closed its $6.2 billion acquisition of Tegna after winning approval from the Federal Communications Commission and Department of Justice.

headline: Versant Media: The Jury Is Still Out Here
summary: Versant Media Group shares rebounded from $27 to $35 after initial post-spin-off declines. Click here to read my latest analysis of VSNT stock.

headline: How CNBC Cures is bringing rare disease stories to a national audience
summary: Two months after its launch, CNBC's rare disease initiative is starting to reach a broader audience.
